description_long: This object is a large, industrial-style structure resembling a half-pipe ramp, constructed primarily from corrugated metal panels and reinforced with wooden railings along the top edges. The central section features a smooth, curved surface, flanked by vertical metal walls on both sides, and the ends are capped with flat platforms. One side displays prominent branding with the text 'GIRL SKATEBOARD COMPANY' and some graffiti, while the opposite side is plain with minor graffiti. The metal surfaces show signs of weathering and rust, giving the structure an aged, utilitarian appearance. The top railings are made of wood and provide a safety barrier along the upper edges. There are no visible water channels, spillways, or control gates, and the structure is fully enclosed with no open passage for water.
description: A large, weathered metal and wood structure with a curved central ramp, flanked by vertical walls and topped with wooden railings. Branding and graffiti are visible on one side, giving it an urban, industrial look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat metal wall with wooden railings and no visible branding or graffiti.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full curved ramp, wooden railings, and the open interior of the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the 'GIRL SKATEBOARD COMPANY' branding and graffiti on the metal wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the curved ramp and some graffiti on the metal wall, but no branding.
